name: wxops
description: Webex Calling reports, CDR, billing context, and wxcli passthrough.
readme: Exposes wxops_fetch_report, wxops_list_reports, wxops_run_command, wxops_billing_context, wxops_analyze_csv.

name: roomos
description: RoomOS xAPI control for Webex devices — dial, mute, camera, standby.
readme: Control RoomOS endpoints via Cloud API. Requires device IDs and xAPI scopes.

name: vidcast
description: Search and retrieve Vidcast recordings, playlists, and transcripts.

name: my-orchestrator
description: Meta-MCP for discovering other MCP servers on the machine.
